pages.raw_text:
~ Officials at Great Northern head
y quarters in st. Paul are beginning
to know Deputy Sheriff s. D. Doak
OF Spokane. county, who has re-
turned from his second visit to the
Hill headquarters with grand jury
subpoenas. When serving the sub
poenas he found Louis w. Hill,
president of the company; w. r.
Begg. general counsel, and K. Saw.
yer, the treasurer, together in
Hills office.


Hill accepted service without
comment, but Begg wanted to
know how long the grand jury was
,xyoing to keep up the matter. Doak
Sold him that they were going to
sStay with the thing until they got
to the bottom of it.


President Hill told Doak that
Comptroller Drew was out Of town,
but the deputy found Drew in his
office and served him.


The Great Northern officials did
not either agree or refuse to come
to Spokane. but as they have not
yet indicated any intention of COM
ing 1t has been taken for granted
that they have again concluded to
stand pat"
